sglang.title: [feat]Support fusion kernel for constructing quant input and scale factor for fp8_blockwise_scaled_grouped_mm
sglang.author: HydraQYH
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Follow #7278, #7782, #7932
On the Hopper architecture, the FP8 Blockwise Scaling Grouped GEMM based on CUTLASS has a different scale factor format from the Blackwell architecture and DeepGEMM. Therefore, some optimized quant kernels(e.g. https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/sgl-kernel/csr

add video data and audio data to engine entrypoint.

Modifications
Summary

Problem

sglang.title: Fix the input tools format and history tool_calls in OpenAI API
sglang.author: chen700564
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Adjust the input for the OpenAI API


Keep the full tool dictionary in the input, consistent with vLLM, instead of only retaining the function field.


After a tool_call is generated, it is structured as:


{
  ...,
  "function": {
    "name": "xxx",
    "arguments": "json.dumps(...)"

vllm.title: [TPU] Optimize kv cache update kernel
vllm.author: tengyifei
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR improves the throughput of the kv cache update kernel from 28.15 GB/s to 91.65 GB/s on v6e.
This PR adds to optimizations on top of #19928. It picks the optimal number of slices to copy per kernel program instance based on results from microbenchmarks.
Reference data demonstrating im

vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

On main right now we have quite a bit of code duplication regarding the calculation of the mamba state shapes. For V0, it is implemented in each model individually, and for V1 it is implemented again in the MambaMixer2. The calculation is very slightly different between V0 and V1.

Disables have_fun to stop unnecessary verbosity in comments.
Increase comment threshold to HIGH to reduce the number of comments.
Disable the PR summary so that developers/reviewers don't get 2 notifications from Gemini per PR (one from the summary, one from the review), the developer should already

vllm.title: [Deprecation] Remove `nullable_kvs`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Removes deprecated method of passing JSON data to CLI.
Deprecation deadline was v0.10.0, which is the next release.
We also now have much better ways to pass JSON data:

JSON blobs will be validated by pydantic
Individual keys can be passed as --my-arg.json_key json_val

vllm.title: Add full serve CLI reference back to docs
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Now that #20206 has merged. This PR reinstates the full vllm serve --help CLI reference that was unfortunately removed in the upgrade from Sphinx to MkDocs in #18145.

vllm.title: [ROCm] warpSize is being made non constexpr in ROCm 7.0
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
ROCm7.0 hip compiler adds a breaking change of making warpSize a non constexpr value
Using an alternative method of deducing the right warp size to use
References:
https://rocm.blogs.amd.com/ecosystems-and-partners/transition-to-hip-7.0:-guidance-on-upcoming-compatibility-changes/README.html#warpsiz

the causal-conv1d kernel now makes use of metadata to accelerate computation (it was missed out) from the previous PR #18218

Added indexing fix to t
